posts.title: Shadow First, Canary Second: A Safer Release Workflow for LLM Changes
posts.summary: Treat LLM prompt/model updates like reliability releases: run shadow evaluations before user impact, then canary with explicit promotion gates on outcome metrics and rollback triggers.

posts.title: Rollback Budget: The Missing Guardrail in LLM Rollouts
posts.summary: A rollback budget sets an explicit limit on acceptable post-release regression and forces faster, less political rollback decisions.

posts.title: Stop Arguing About LLM Rollouts: Use a Reliability Scorecard
posts.summary: A release scorecard turns model rollout decisions from opinion fights into explicit gate checks across quality, safety, latency, and cost.

posts.title: Don’t Roll Out New LLM Models All at Once: Use Canary Gates
posts.summary: Most model upgrades fail quietly before they fail loudly. Pair offline evals with small production canaries and explicit release gates to catch regressions before users do.
